---
title: "Many Penguins"
subtitle: "Submission for Tidy Tuesday 2026-07-14"
date: 2026-07-17
author: Ntobeko Sosibo
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-title: "Outline"
toc-depth: 6
format:
  html:
    mainfont: "Inter, sans-serif"
    page-layout: article
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 3840px
      margin-width: 25px
      gutter-width: 4rem
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="www/icons/favicon.png">
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained: true
execute:
  freeze: auto
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## Focus: 

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

## Sources  

* [Penguins Call Underwater](https://hakaimagazine.com/news/penguins-call-underwater/)  
* [Macaroni penguin, Eudyptes chrysolophus, single bird underwater, captive](https://www.dreamstime.com/royalty-free-stock-image-macaroni-penguin-eudyptes-chrysolophus-single-bird-underwater-captive-image34829096)  
* [Rockhopper Penguin (Eudyptes chrysocome), adult, diving, captive, South Africa](https://www.alamy.com/stock-photo-rockhopper-penguin-eudyptes-chrysocome-adult-diving-captive-south-78567747.html)  
* [Emperor Penguins: Breeding Season and Adaptations](https://www.bcheungbiomedicalillustration.com/penguin)  
* [Penguins](https://ocean.si.edu/ocean-life/seabirds/penguins)  
* [Lewis Pugh's United Nations Biodiversity Facebook Post](https://www.facebook.com/LewisPughOceans/posts/there-are-18-known-species-of-penguin-my-favourite-is-the-northern-rockhopper-wh/717605809748228/)
